description_long: This is a classic wristwatch featuring a round metallic case with a silver-toned dial and a brown leather strap. The dial is adorned with simple hour markers and slender hands, giving it a clean and elegant appearance. The watch case appears to be made of stainless steel, with a slightly raised bezel and a crown on the right side for adjusting the time. The brown strap is smooth, likely genuine or synthetic leather, and is attached to the case with standard lugs. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible subdials or complications, emphasizing timeless style. There is no visible brand logo or decorative embellishments on the dial or strap.
description: A classic wristwatch with a silver round dial and a brown leather strap, featuring minimalist hour markers and hands. The design is clean and elegant, with no visible branding or complications.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round silver dial, brown strap, and clear hour markers and hands.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thinness of the watch case and the full length of the brown strap.
description_view_2: Rear view of the watch, showing the back of the dial and the strap's buckle area.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim case and the extended brown strap.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is silver-toned with minimalist hour markers and slender hands, lacking numerals or subdials. The design is clean and uncluttered, with no decorative elements or complications.
attribute_strap_type: Brown leather strap with a smooth finish and standard stitching, attached with traditional lugs.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with two or three hands (hour, minute, possibly second), no visible complications or special features.
